examples: Plants won't propagate in these conditions.
The easiest way to propagate a vine is to take hardwood cuttings.
Many of the species native to California, such as the prickly chaparral, rely on fires to propagate.
The name draws on old ideas about a supposedly ubiquitous, invisible medium that helped light propagate.
One 800 Mhz cell site can propagate a signal across an extensive geographic area.
